BoneTeaDescription.string_value: At the start of the next combat, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] your starting hand.

EmberTeaDescription.string_value: At the start of the next [blue]5[/blue] combats, gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].

TeaOfDiscourtesyDescription.string_value: At the start of the next combat, shuffle [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Dazed[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
